Wraps · Lunch
Garden Veg Wrap
Soft tortilla filled with grilled zucchini, roasted peppers, baby spinach, creamy hummus and garlic aioli
VGN
FJD$32
Price
1×
Portions
8 min
Prep
5 min
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Wrap
Flour tortilla 12"each1
Filling
Zucchini, grilledg80
Roasted red peppersg60
Baby spinachg30
Hummusg50
Sauce
Garlic aiolig30
Method
1
Lay tortilla flat on board.
2
Spread hummus evenly across centre, leaving a 3 cm border.
3
Layer baby spinach, grilled zucchini and roasted peppers.
4
Drizzle garlic aioli over filling.
5
Fold sides in, roll tightly from base. Cut on 45° angle.
6
Plate cut-side up with fries.
Plating Notes
Serve cut on diagonal, cut-side forward. Fries in side ramekin.
Equipment
Grill · Chopping board · Serrated knife
Allergens
GLUTEN EGGS
DAIRY TREE NUTS PEANUTS SHELLFISH FISH SOY SESAME CELERY MUSTARD LUPIN MOLLUSCS SULPHITES
